# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the working tree diff. The only modified files are under `.ralph-burning/`, which the prompt explicitly excludes from review scope, and `git diff -- . ':(exclude).ralph-burning'` is empty. No reviewable implementation changes were present, so there are no findings.

## Amendments

None.
